events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario. It says selected tool and material package for Overcurrent device selection & coordination matches size, rating, application on referenced sheet. Staged parts clean, intact, sized. Reference material on hand. Stage staged. No component conditions flagged. Need decision likely pass. Need fill fields. Need include references. Risk low. Work_stage staged. percent_complete maybe 0? Since staged but work not begun, overall progress maybe 10? They say percent_complete numeric estimate of overall progress. For staged materials ready, maybe 5 or 10. Use 10. Value 0. Sound_source empty? Schema string. Could use "". event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list. findings empty, actions empty. rationale brief. references code anchors. Need ensure valid JSON. No prose outside.
